ParticleReader.cc
1 #include <arcane/IParallelMng.h>
2 #include "ParticleReader.h"
3 
4 
5 
6 
7 #include <arcane/MeshItemInternalList.h>
8 #include "arcane/VariableTypes.h"
9 #include "arcane/mesh/ParticleFamily.h"
10 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
11 
12 ArcGeoSim::ParticleReader::
13 ParticleReader(IMesh* mesh,
14  XmlNode mesh_data,
15  Arcane::IParallelMng* parallel_mng,
16  Arcane::ITraceMng* trace_mng,
17  const Arcane::String& directory_name)
18 : m_mesh(mesh)
19 , m_mesh_data(mesh_data)
20 , m_parallel_mng(parallel_mng)
21 , m_trace_mng(trace_mng)
22 , m_particle_coords(NULL)
23 , m_directory_name(directory_name)
24 {
25 }
26 
27 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
28 
29 void
30 ArcGeoSim::ParticleReader::
31 collectiveRead()
32 {
33  // your code here
34  bool is_master = true ;
35  if(m_parallel_mng && m_parallel_mng->commRank()!=m_parallel_mng->masterIORank())
36  is_master = false ;
37  if(is_master)
38  {
39  ARCANE_ASSERT((!m_mesh_data.null()), ("No mesh file loaded in IXM V4 reader."))
40  XmlNode rootNode = m_mesh_data.child("topology");
41  Arcane::XmlNode particles_node = rootNode.child("particles");
42  Integer use_particles = particles_node.null()?0:1 ;
43  if(m_parallel_mng)
44  m_parallel_mng->broadcast(ArrayView<Integer>(1,&use_particles),m_parallel_mng->masterIORank()) ;
45  if(use_particles==0) return ;
46  // Get managers
47  ItemTypeMng * typeMng = ItemTypeMng::singleton();
48  { // Handle created particles
49  _readParticleInfos(rootNode.children("particles"), "particles", typeMng);
50  }
51  }
52  else
53  {
54  Integer use_particles = 0 ;
55  m_parallel_mng->broadcast(ArrayView<Integer>(1,&use_particles),m_parallel_mng->masterIORank()) ;
56  if(use_particles!=0)
57  {
58  //Create DefaultParticleFamily
59  IItemFamily* myFam = m_mesh->findItemFamily(IK_Particle, "Particle", false);
60  if(myFam==NULL)
61  {
62 #if ARCANE_VERSION >= 12201
63  myFam = m_mesh->createItemFamily(IK_Particle, mesh::ParticleFamily::defaultFamilyName()) ;
64  IParticleFamily* particle_family = dynamic_cast<IParticleFamily*>(myFam) ;
65  particle_family->setEnableGhostItems(true) ;
66 #else
67  myFam = m_mesh->createItemFamily(IK_Particle, "Particle") ;
68 #endif
69  }
70  myFam->endUpdate();
71  //Create ParticleCoords variable
72  // ATT: on ne peut ajouter les coords qu'apres la creation des particles
73  m_particle_coords = new VariableParticleReal3(VariableBuildInfo(m_mesh, "ParticleCoord", "Particle"));
74  m_particle_coords->setUsed(true);
75  }
76  }
77 }
78 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
79 
80 void
81 ArcGeoSim::ParticleReader::
82 _readParticleInfos(
83  const XmlNodeList& particle_list_node,
84  const String& block_name,
85  ItemTypeMng * typeMng)
86 {
87  // Error messages
88  String error_particule_ids = Arcane::String::format("Error while reading {0} particle-ids", block_name);
89  String error_types = Arcane::String::format("Error while reading {0} particle-types", block_name);
90  String error_cell_ids = Arcane::String::format("Error while reading {0} cell-ids", block_name);
91  String error_coords = Arcane::String::format("Error while reading {0} particle-coords", block_name);
92 
93  // The particles family
94  IItemFamily* myFam = m_mesh->findItemFamily(IK_Particle, "Particle", false);
95  if(myFam==NULL)
96  {
97 #if ARCANE_VERSION >= 12201
98  myFam = m_mesh->createItemFamily(IK_Particle, mesh::ParticleFamily::defaultFamilyName()) ;
99  IParticleFamily* particle_family = dynamic_cast<IParticleFamily*>(myFam) ;
100  particle_family->setEnableGhostItems(true) ;
101 #else
102  myFam = m_mesh->createItemFamily(IK_Particle, "Particle") ;
103 #endif
104  }
105 
106  // Temporary variables
107  Cell myCell;
108 
109  Int32SharedArray all_particle_lids;
110  all_particle_lids.reserve(10);
111  Real3SharedArray all_xyz;
112  all_xyz.reserve(10);
113  // Read each block of data
114  for (XmlNodeList::const_iterator iPartList = particle_list_node.begin(); iPartList != particle_list_node.end();
115  ++iPartList)
116  {
117  // Reading particles variables
118  Int64SharedArray part_ids = IXMInt64DataNodeReader(iPartList->child("particle-ids"), error_particule_ids, m_directory_name).read();
119  IntegerSharedArray part_type_ids = IXMIntegerDataNodeReader(iPartList->child("particle-types"), error_types, m_directory_name).read();
120  Int64SharedArray cell_ids = IXMInt64DataNodeReader(iPartList->child("cell-ids"), error_cell_ids, m_directory_name).read();
121 
122  Real3SharedArray xyz = IXMReal3DataNodeReader(iPartList->child("particle-coords"), error_coords, m_directory_name).read();
123  all_xyz.addRange(xyz);
124 
125  Int32SharedArray particle_lids(part_ids.size());
126  ParticleVectorView part_vector_view = myFam->toParticleFamily()->addParticles(part_ids, particle_lids);
127 
128  all_particle_lids.addRange(particle_lids);
129 
130  Int32 temp_index = 0;
131  MeshItemInternalList* items = m_mesh->meshItemInternalList();
132 
133  Arcane::Int32SharedArray cell_lids(cell_ids.size());
134  m_mesh->cellFamily()->itemsUniqueIdToLocalId(cell_lids, cell_ids, true);
135 
136  // Setting the associated cell for a particle if exist
137  for (Int32 i = 0; i < part_type_ids.size(); i++)
138  {
139  if (part_type_ids[i] > 0)
140  {
141  myCell = items->cells[cell_lids[temp_index]];
142 
143  myFam->toParticleFamily()->setParticleCell(part_vector_view[i], myCell);
144  temp_index += part_type_ids[i];
145  }
146  else
147  {
148  myFam->toParticleFamily()->setParticleCell(part_vector_view[i], Cell());
149  temp_index++;
150  }
151  }
152 
153  }
154 
155  // End update for the family
156  myFam->endUpdate();
157 
158  // ATT: on ne peut ajouter les coords qu'apres la creation des particles
159  m_particle_coords = new VariableParticleReal3(VariableBuildInfo(m_mesh, "ParticleCoord", "Particle"));
160  m_particle_coords->setUsed(true);
161  mesh::ParticleFamily* true_particle_family = dynamic_cast<mesh::ParticleFamily*>(m_mesh->findItemFamily("Particle"));
162  ItemInternalList particles(true_particle_family->itemsInternal());
163  for (Integer i = 0, is = all_particle_lids.size(); i < is; i++)
164  {
165  (*m_particle_coords)[particles[all_particle_lids[i]]] = all_xyz[i];
166  }
167 }
168 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
169 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
IXMDataNodeReader
Definition: IXMMeshReaderTools.h:71

  • ArcGeoSim
